The '''Cavern of Teeth''' was a large cavern in [[Eskaron]] which at least one race course went through. The cavern was over three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] long and around 200 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] high. The cavern got its name from the enormous stalactites and stalagmites littered throughout. A [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] could not fly straight through the cavern, having instead to dodge around the pillars. Sometimes pilot shot the stalactites, to make them fall on their rivals.

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Blood Raptors]] member [[Gael Kinner]]'s [[G-59 Cannibalizer]] and intimidated [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] entrepreneur [[Teeloo]]'s [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210 light freighter]] ''[[Neeva-Beelo]]'' raced through Eskaron, passing through this area.

==Appearances==
